name: What if my AEO efforts make my site look spammy to Google?
description: User-focused content safe; avoid stuffing.[2][4] Monitor Console.

mainEntity.name: What if my AEO efforts make my site look spammy to Google?

acceptedAnswer.text: User-focused content safe; avoid stuffing.[2][4] Monitor Console.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Quality, user-first AEO content enhances SEO if natural; avoid keyword stuffing to prevent penalties.** Balance benefits AI and search.[2][4]

Over-optimization risks flags, but helpful FAQs boost both.[3] Nationwide concern.

**Key factors:**
- Prioritize E-E-A-T naturally.[2]
- Answer genuinely, not robotically.
- Monitor Google Search Console.
- Diversify traffic sources.

Write as you'd advise clients; audit quarterly. If penalized, disavow bad links immediately.
